The '''Jedi outland speeder bike''' was a type of [[speeder bike]] that was used by the [[Jedi Order]].<ref name="Databank">{{Databank|jedi-outland-speeder-bike|Jedi outland speeder bike}}</ref> The [[Wookiee]] [[Kelnacca]] fixed such a [[speeder bike]] while on the [[planet]] [[Brendok]] during the [[High Republic Era]].<ref name="Destiny">{{Acolyte|Destiny (The Acolyte)}}</ref>
